title: Exeption occurred on closing panel with connections inside
author: genepy
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
mRemotNG not crash and just close panel and connections in this panel

## Current Behavior
mRemotNG crash and need to be closed


## Possible Solution

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)
<!--- Provide an unambiguous set of steps to reproduce -->
<!--- this bug. Include code to reproduce, if relevant -->
1. open 2 or more panels with one or more connections inside
2. close one panel with one or more connections still opened
3. some time mRemotNG don't crash

## Yo...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Update:

- Fix is proposed in upstream PR:
  - PR #3106 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG`

Scope: close-panel race/dispose handling hardening in `ConnectionWindow`.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
